mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, price, quantity) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.sku_id, oi.product_name, oi.sku_name, oi.price, oi.quantity FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN t_order o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
